@@ -0,0 +1,274 @@
+# Roadmap
+
+## Walking skeleton (ITER-0000)
+
+**Intent:** Prove Ghost Pepper exists as a menu bar dictation app that can hotkey-record, transcribe speech with one local speech-model path, and deliver the result through clipboard fallback with visible feedback.
+**Design rationale:** This is the thinnest end-to-end slice that demonstrates the product loop without onboarding, real paste targeting, cleanup, OCR, settings, or history. It proves shell, hotkey, audio capture, model bootstrap, transcription, clipboard delivery, and user feedback together.
+**Stories committed:**
+- STORY-0601 (EPIC-018)
+- STORY-0034 (EPIC-002)
+- STORY-0036 (EPIC-002)
+- STORY-0060 (EPIC-003)
+- STORY-0062 (EPIC-003)
+- STORY-0073 (EPIC-003)
+- STORY-0090 (EPIC-003)
+- STORY-0091 (EPIC-003)
+- STORY-0093 (EPIC-003)
+- STORY-0120 (EPIC-004)

+- STORY-0406 (EPIC-011)
+- STORY-0186 (EPIC-005)
+**Status:** pending
+
+## Iteration list
+
+### ITER-0001 — Accessibility paste delivery
+
+**Stories:** STORY-0001, STORY-0002, STORY-0003, STORY-0004, STORY-0005, STORY-0006, STORY-0007, STORY-0008, STORY-0009, STORY-0010
+STORY-0011, STORY-0012, STORY-0013, STORY-0014, STORY-0015, STORY-0016, STORY-0017, STORY-0018, STORY-0019, STORY-0020
+STORY-0021, STORY-0022, STORY-0023, STORY-0024, STORY-0025, STORY-0026, STORY-0027, STORY-0028, STORY-0029, STORY-0030
+STORY-0031, STORY-0223, STORY-0224, STORY-0225, STORY-0226, STORY-0227, STORY-0228, STORY-0229, STORY-0230, STORY-0231
+STORY-0232, STORY-0233, STORY-0234, STORY-0235, STORY-0236, STORY-0237, STORY-0238, STORY-0239, STORY-0240, STORY-0241
+STORY-0242, STORY-0243, STORY-0244, STORY-0246, STORY-0247, STORY-0248, STORY-0249, STORY-0251, STORY-0252, STORY-0255
+STORY-0256, STORY-0257, STORY-0258, STORY-0259
+**Rationale:** Replace clipboard-only delivery with the full accessibility-driven paste path once the skeleton already has a safe fallback output path.
+**Status:** pending
+**Look-ahead check:** Builds directly on the skeleton output path and unlocks post-paste learning later without forcing onboarding or settings work first.
+

+

+

+

+STORY-0971
+**Rationale:** Complete the user-visible model inventory, preferences, and cleanup-model lifecycle once persistence and speech-model loading are both real.

+

+**Stories:** STORY-0872, STORY-0873, STORY-0874, STORY-0875, STORY-0876, STORY-0877, STORY-0878, STORY-0879, STORY-0880, STORY-0881

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+

+
+### ITER-0020 — Runtime app updates

+**Rationale:** Introduce in-app update behavior once the main menu-bar product loop is stable enough to distribute and upgrade in place.
+**Status:** pending

+
